'''Proy'skyn''' was an investigator with the [[Drev'starn]] [[Drev'starn Department of Criminal Discouragement|Department of Criminal Discouragement]] who was sent to the [[Exoticalia Pet Emporium]] on a tip from [[Moranda Savich]] about a break-in.

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
